scripts.clean: pnpm run clean:frontend && pnpm run clean:backend && pnpm run clean:root
scripts.install_dependencies:debian: sudo apt install build-essential pkg-config libgtk-3-dev libglib2.0-dev libwebkit2gtk-4.1-dev libayatana-appindicator3-dev librsvg2-dev libssl-dev
scripts.project:init: pnpm install && cd src-astro && pnpm install
